• Authentic Middle Eastern Flavour: A smooth and delicious hommus with a classic, traditional taste.
  • Perfect Texture: Creamy and rich, with the ideal consistency for dipping, spreading, or pairing with your favourite dishes.
  • Dairy & Gluten-Free: A versatile option suitable for various dietary preferences and needs.
  • 100% Aussie Grown Chickpeas
  • Convenient Snack Pack: Includes three 65g tubs, ideal for on-the-go snacking or packed lunches.

A standout member of Yumi’s classic dips range that’s always a crowd-pleaser.
Hommus is the signature member of Yumi’s classic dips range—and it’s easy to see why! With its smooth taste, delicious flavour, and perfect texture, Yumi’s Traditional Hommus Dip delivers everything you could want in a classic hommus. Also available in:
200g, 500g & 1kg
